mapper.sql: t1.ID, t1.PARTY_CODE, t1.PARTY_NAME, t1.IS_LEAD_PARTY, t1.CREATED_BY, t1.CREATION_DATE, t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY, t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP, t1.VERSION, t1.ORG_IDENTITY, t1.CREATED_DEPT, t1.PARENT_ID, t1.TREE_PATH, t1.TREE_SORT, t1.TREE_SORTS, t1.TREE_LEAF, t1.TREE_LEVEL, t1.VALID_FLAG, t1.ATTRIBUTE_01, t1.ATTRIBUTE_02, t1.ATTRIBUTE_03, t1.ATTRIBUTE_04, t1.ATTRIBUTE_05, t1.ATTRIBUTE_06, t1.ATTRIBUTE_07, t1.ATTRIBUTE_08, t1.ATTRIBUTE_09, t1.ATTRIBUTE_10
mapper.select:
select
from PARTY_ORGANIZATION t1 where t1.PARENT_ID = #{id} order by t1.tree_sorts asc

select
from PARTY_ORGANIZATION t1 where t1.PARENT_ID = #{parentId} and t1.id <> #{id} order by t1.tree_sorts asc

select
from PARTY_ORGANIZATION t1
or t1.id in
#{id}
order by t1.tree_sorts asc

select
from PARTY_ORGANIZATION t1
and t1.org_identity = #{orgIdentity}
and t1.PARENT_ID = '-1'

select
from PARTY_ORGANIZATION t1
and t1.tree_path like concat(#{treePath},'%') and t1.tree_path <> #{treePath}
order by t1.tree_sorts asc
mapper.insert:
insert into PARTY_ORGANIZATION
ID,
PARTY_CODE,
PARTY_NAME,
IS_LEAD_PARTY,
CREATED_BY,
CREATION_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
LAST_UPDATE_IP,
VERSION,
ORG_IDENTITY,
CREATED_DEPT,
PARENT_ID,
TREE_PATH,
TREE_SORT,
TREE_SORTS,
TREE_LEAF,
TREE_LEVEL,
VALID_FLAG,
ATTRIBUTE_01,
ATTRIBUTE_02,
ATTRIBUTE_03,
ATTRIBUTE_04,
ATTRIBUTE_05,
ATTRIBUTE_06,
ATTRIBUTE_07,
ATTRIBUTE_08,
ATTRIBUTE_09,
ATTRIBUTE_10,
#{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{partyCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{partyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{isLeadParty,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{parentId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{treePath,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{treeSort,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{treeSorts,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{treeLeaf,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{treeLevel,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{validFlag,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update PARTY_ORGANIZATION
ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PARTY_CODE = #{partyCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PARTY_NAME = #{partyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
IS_LEAD_PARTY = #{isLeadParty,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
VERSION = version+1,
ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PARENT_ID = #{parentId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
TREE_PATH = #{treePath,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
TREE_SORT = #{treeSort,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
TREE_SORTS = #{treeSorts,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
TREE_LEAF = #{treeLeaf,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
TREE_LEVEL = #{treeLevel,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
VALID_FLAG = #{validFlag,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_01 = #{attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_02 = #{attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_03 = #{attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_04 = #{attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_05 = #{attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_06 = #{attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_07 = #{attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_08 = #{attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_09 = #{attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_10 = #{attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update.foreach: update PARTY_ORGANIZATION set ID = #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_CODE = #{item.partyCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_NAME = #{item.partyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , IS_LEAD_PARTY = #{item.isLeadParty,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_BY = #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , ORG_IDENTITY = #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARENT_ID = #{item.parentId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TREE_PATH = #{item.treePath,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TREE_SORT = #{item.treeSort,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , TREE_SORTS = #{item.treeSorts,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TREE_LEAF = #{item.treeLeaf,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TREE_LEVEL = #{item.treeLevel,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , VALID_FLAG = #{item.validFlag,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_01 = #{item.attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_02 = #{item.attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_03 = #{item.attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_04 = #{item.attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_05 = #{item.attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_06 = #{item.attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_07 = #{item.attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_08 = #{item.attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_09 = #{item.attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_10 = #{item.attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{item.id} and version = #{item.version}

mapper.select: select MAX(TREE_SORT) from PARTY_ORGANIZATION t1 where t1.PARENT_ID = #{parentId}

select count(*) from party_organization where id in ( select id from party_organization t start with t.id = #{id} connect by prior t.id = t.parent_id) and party_name like '%党小组%' and party_name != '无党小组'

select count(*) from party_organ_member t1 left join sys_lookup_v v on t1.USER_POST = v.lookup_code where party_id in ( select id from party_organization t start with t.id = #{id} connect by prior t.id = t.parent_id) and v.lookup_type = 'PARTY_POST' and lookup_name like '%委员%'
select count(*) from DYN_HUANJIE_DYDH t1 left join dyn_sub_hjxjdydh_3 t2 ON t1.id = t2.fk_sub_col_id where t1.party_id = #{id} and t2.DIVISION_LABOR like '%委员%'

select count(*) from party_organ_member t1 left join sys_lookup_v v on t1.USER_POST = v.lookup_code where party_id in ( select id from party_organization t start with t.id = #{id} connect by prior t.id = t.parent_id) and v.lookup_type = 'PARTY_POST' and lookup_name like '%纪委委员%'
select count(*) from DYN_HUANJIE_DYDH t1 left join dyn_sub_hjxjdydh_3 t2 ON t1.id = t2.fk_sub_col_id where t1.party_id = #{id} and t2.DIVISION_LABOR like '%纪委委员%'

select u.name from party_organ_member t1 left join sys_lookup_v v on t1.USER_POST = v.lookup_code left join sys_user u on t1.user_id = u.id where party_id = #{id} and v.lookup_type = 'PARTY_POST' and lookup_name like '%纪委书记%' and rownum =1

select u.name from party_organ_member t1 left join sys_lookup_v v on t1.USER_POST = v.lookup_code left join sys_user u on t1.user_id = u.id where party_id = #{id} and v.lookup_type = 'PARTY_POST' and lookup_name like '%书记%' and rownum =1
select PARTY_TYPE from ( select * from dyn_huanjie_qs where party_id = #{id} order by creation_date desc ) where rownum = 1
select requst_date from DYN_HUANJIE_TIXING where party_id = #{id}
select ELECTION_TIME from DYN_HUANJIE_DYDH where party_id = #{id}
select party_name from party_organization where parent_id = #{id} and attribute_01 = '3'
select count(*) from party_organ_member t1 where party_id = #{id} and user_post = '12'
select count(*) from party_organization t1 where party_name like '%支部%' or party_name like '%党委%' and party_name != '中国XXXX党委'
select count(*) from party_organization t1 where party_name like '%党委%' and party_name != '中国XXXX党委'
select count(*) from party_organization t1 where party_name like '%党总支%'
select count(*) from party_organization t1 where party_name like '%党支部%' and parent_id = '402811817e482ecb017e483065e4014e'

select count(*) from party_organization t1 where party_name like '%党支部%' and parent_id != '402811817e482ecb017e483065e4014e' and ((select party_name from party_organization where id = t1.parent_id) like '%党委%' or (select party_name from party_organization where id = t1.parent_id) like '%党总支%')
select count(*) from party_organization t1 where party_name like '%纪委%' and parent_id != '402811817e482ecb017e483065e4014e'

select count(*) as num, t1.SESSION_TYPE as sessionType, t1.party_type as partyType from DYN_PARTY_ORG_INFO t1 where t1.CREA_TIME <= to_date(#{outtime},'yyyy-mm') and t1.crea_time >= to_date(#{sytime},'yyyy-mm') group by t1.SESSION_TYPE, t1.party_type
select count(*) from DYN_SESSION_WYFG t where t.USER_SEX = '女' and t.USER_TYPE lisk '%书记%' and t.SESSION_TIME <= to_date(#{outtime},'yyyy-mm') and t.SESSION_TIME >= to_date(#{sytime},'yyyy-mm')
select count(*) from DYN_SESSION_WYFG t where t.USER_TYPE lisk '%纪委书记%' and t.SESSION_TIME <= to_date(#{outtime},'yyyy-mm') and t.SESSION_TIME >= to_date(#{sytime},'yyyy-mm')
select count(*) from DYN_SESSION_WYFG t where t.USER_TYPE lisk '%组织委员%' and t.SESSION_TIME <= to_date(#{outtime},'yyyy-mm') and t.SESSION_TIME >= to_date(#{sytime},'yyyy-mm')
